msg: PLANNED iter002_wn128_s3: Increase WARP_N 64->128 to improve compute/mem ratio for K-heavy shape
PLANNED iter003_wn128_s4: Increase pipeline stages 3->4 to better hide memory latency with low occupancy
PLANNED iter004_ws1p1c: Switch from 1p2c to 1p1c topology for higher occupancy
PLANNED iter005_wn192_s4: Increase WARP_N 128->192 for more compute per CTA
PLANNED iter006_wn256_s2: Push WARP_N to 256, reduce stages to 2 to fit shared memory
PLANNED iter007_persis_wn192: Persistent kernel with WARP_N=192, 3 stages - amortize launch overhead
PLANNED iter008_persis_wn128_s4: Persistent WARP_N=128 with 4 stages for more pipeline depth
PLANNED iter009_persis_1p3c: Persistent 1p3c TILE_M=192 for more consumers processing the K-heavy workload
PLANNED iter010_transp_store: Add mma.store.transp for bank-conflict-free epilogue (8-way bank conflicts seen)
PLANNED iter011_swiz64: Reduce SWIZ from 128 to 64 to reduce bank conflicts in 8-way conflict scenario
PLANNED iter012_np_1p3c: Non-persistent 1p3c with TILE_M=192, WARP_N=192 for more consumers without persistent barrier complexity
PLANNED iter013_persis_1p1c_wn192: Persistent 1p1c with TILE_M=64 and WARP_N=192 to increase occupancy (fewer warpgroups)
PLANNED iter014_launch_bounds: Phase 2: Add __launch_bounds__(384,1) to iter007 kernel to control register usage
PLANNED iter015_unroll_warp: Phase 2: Add #pragma unroll to iv_warp loop on iter014 base
PLANNED iter016_persis_wn160_s4: Persistent with WARP_N=160, 4 stages, and launch_bounds to fit shared memory while increasing pipeline depth
PLANNED iter017_persis_wn164_s4: Persistent WARP_N=164, 4 stages - maximum WARP_N that fits shared memory with 4 stages
PLANNED iter018_persis_tm64_wn192_s4: Persistent TILE_M=64, WARP_N=192, 4 stages - reduce register pressure while keeping high N and pipeline depth
PLANNED iter019_persis_wn192_lb2: Persistent WARP_N=192, 3 stages with __launch_bounds__(384,2) to increase occupancy
PLANNED iter020_np_wn160_s4: Non-persistent WARP_N=160, 4 stages with launch_bounds - compare to persistent iter016
PLANNED iter021_np_wn192_s3: Non-persistent WARP_N=192, 3 stages with launch_bounds - more compute per CTA
PLANNED iter022_np_wn128_s5: Non-persistent WARP_N=128, 5 stages - test if deeper pipeline compensates smaller WARP_N
PLANNED iter039_np_tm256_wn160_s3: TILE_M=256 WARP_N=160 STAGES=3 1p4c - larger tile reduces barrier stall frequency
PLANNED iter040_np_1p1c_wn160_s5: 1p1c topology TILE_M=128 WARP_N=160 5 stages - eliminate cross-consumer barrier stalls
PLANNED iter041_np_wn160_s4_pad16: Add +16 byte SMEM padding per row to eliminate bank conflicts (Phase 2 .cu edit)
PLANNED iter042_np_wn176_s4: WARP_N=176 (m64n176k16 MMA shape) - untested intermediate N between 160 and 192
PLANNED iter043_np_wn160_s4_epilog: Split epilogue: write MMA results to smem then TMA to global (same as iter020 but verify baseline)
PLANNED iter044_np_wn128_1p3c_s4: 1p3c topology TILE_M=192 WARP_N=128 4 stages - more consumers may reduce barrier stalls
PLANNED iter045_np_wn160_s4_wb: Add warpgroup_arrive before mma.commit to improve pipeline overlap
PLANNED iter046_np_tm64_wn192_s4: TILE_M=64 WARP_N=192 4 stages 1p1c - wide N with 4 stages
PLANNED iter047_np_wn144_s5: Non-persistent WARP_N=144 with 5 stages to reduce smem usage and increase occupancy
PLANNED iter048_np_tm96_wn160_s4: Non-persistent TILE_M=96 WARP_N=160 4-stage to create more blocks for better SM coverage
PLANNED iter048_np_tm64_wn160_s4_1p1c: Non-persistent TILE_M=64 WARP_N=160 4-stage 1p1c for 32x13=416 blocks

PLANNED iter049_np_wn160_s3_softsync: Non-persistent WARP_N=160 3-stage with reduced synchronization by using fence instead of commit per-iteration
PLANNED iter050_np_wn160_s4_splitk2: Non-persistent WARP_N=160 4-stage with split-K=2 (process K/2 per CTA, atomicAdd reduce)
PLANNED iter050_np_wn168_s4: Non-persistent WARP_N=168 (intermediate between 160/192, divisible by 8) 4-stage 1p2c

PLANNED iter069_tm64wn192s3: TILE_M=64 single warp row, WARP_N=192, 3 stages - simpler 1-row MMA
